turns.question: Wait -- is that you? I haven't seen you in a while!
turns.answer: Oh my gosh, yeah, it's me! I don't even know how to say how happy I am right now.
turns.answerKo: 어머, 응, 나야! 지금 얼마나 반가운지 말로 표현을 못하겠어.

turns.question: Did I ever tell you how many times I thought about looking you up?
turns.questionKo: 너 찾아볼까 몇 번이나 생각했는지 내가 얘기했었나?
turns.answer: No, you never told me that -- I thought you'd forgotten all about me.
turns.answerKo: 아니, 그런 얘기 안 했잖아, 난 네가 나 완전히 잊은 줄 알았어.

turns.question: Never. Actually, I want you to meet someone -- this is my partner, Maya.
turns.questionKo: 절대 아니지. 사실 소개해주고 싶은 사람이 있어, 내 파트너 마야야.
turns.answer: I've never met you before, but he's told me so much about you already.
turns.answerKo: 처음 뵙는데, 이 사람한테 얘기 많이 들었어요.

turns.question: All good things, I promise. So how many hours a day do you still spend at that little bakery of yours?
turns.questionKo: 좋은 얘기만 했어, 약속해. 근데 너 그 작은 빵집엔 하루에 몇 시간이나 아직도 있어?
turns.answer: Honestly, probably ten -- I still don't know how to say no to a new recipe idea.
turns.answerKo: 솔직히 열 시간쯤? 새 레시피 아이디어엔 아직도 거절을 못하겠더라고.

turns.question: That sounds exactly like you. Would you two care to join us for dinner tonight?
turns.questionKo: 완전 너답다. 오늘 저녁 우리랑 같이 식사할래?
turns.answer: We'd love that -- we don't have any plans tonight anyway.
turns.answerKo: 완전 좋지, 어차피 오늘 저녁 딱히 계획도 없었어.

turns.question: Perfect. Come on, let's go inside and grab a table before it gets busy.
turns.questionKo: 좋았어. 자, 안에 들어가서 붐비기 전에 자리 잡자.
turns.answer: Sounds good -- lead the way, I still remember you always know the best spots.
turns.answerKo: 좋아, 앞장서, 너 항상 좋은 자리 아는 거 아직 기억나.

turns.question: I hope you're not mad I never texted back last year, by the way.
turns.questionKo: 그나저나 작년에 답장 안 한 거, 화 안 났으면 좋겠는데.
turns.answer: Not at all -- I got busy too, so I don't want to cause any drama over something that small.
turns.answerKo: 전혀, 나도 바빴어서, 그런 작은 일로 괜히 분위기 어색하게 만들고 싶지 않아.

turns.question: Good, because I really did miss having you around.
turns.questionKo: 다행이다, 사실 네가 옆에 없어서 진짜 아쉬웠거든.
turns.answer: Same here. Let's make sure we don't lose touch again this time.
turns.answerKo: 나도 그래. 이번엔 진짜 연락 끊기지 말자.
